creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
Created attachment 172779
Diff patch between current port version and upgrade to v2.1.4

Update to version 2.1.4. The reason I'm not going to 2.2.1 (the latest and newly released LTS) can be seen on my previous PR for updating net/opensips:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=211094
